changes: Replaced inline BrandMark+header with ScreenHeader (brand prop) for consistency with shared layout components. Switched from custom leading div to leadingIcon prop on ListRow (uses standard green-50 rounded-[14px] icon square). Fixed accent characters in subtitles: avaliacao->avaliacao, preferencias->preferencias, Configuracoes->Configuracoes. All hooks, navigation, and data logic preserved unchanged.
